# token-group-vars-in-sync

Fails if `plugins/framework/plugins/tooling/plugins/checks/core/token-group-vars.generated.ts`
drifts from the current token-group descriptors (the CSS vars each
`defineTokenGroup` declares, read via its `ui.theme-engine.token-group` web-slot
contribution). Fix by running `./singularity build` and committing the
regenerated manifest.
